SetMax(S) == CHOOSE i \in S : \A j \in S : i >= j

GCD(m, n) == SetMax(DivisorsOf(m) \cap DivisorsOf(n))

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "apply_patch <<'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: GCD_GCD1.tla
@@
 THEOREM GCD1 == \\A m \\in Nat \\ {0} : GCD(m, m) = m
-PROOF OBVIOUS
+PROOF
+  TAKE m \\in Nat \\ {0}
+  <1>1. m \\in DivisorsOf(m) \\cap DivisorsOf(m)
+    BY DEF DivisorsOf, Divides
+  <1>2. \\A j \\in DivisorsOf(m) \\cap DivisorsOf(m) : m >= j
+    BY DEF DivisorsOf, Divides
+  <1>3. GCD(m, m) = m
+    BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF GCD, SetMax
+  <1>4. QED
+    BY <1>3
 
 ===================================================================
*** End Patch
PATCH
~/.tlapm15/bin/tlapm -I ~/.tlapm15/lib/tlaps GCD_GCD1.tla"
